basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Sanginis (Anganwadi Worker) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helper) Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Sanginis and Sahayikas Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website jkicds.com. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the JK Anganwadi Sanginis and Sahayikas Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Worker): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helper): Matriculation

selection_process: Merit based on marks in 10+2 Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the JK Anganwadi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sanginis and Sahayikas posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Sanginis and Sahayikas posts in the Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. One vacancy is for Sanginis and the other is for Sahayikas.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For the Sanginis post, candidates need to have completed 10+2 to Graduation. For the Sahayikas post, a minimum qualification of Matriculation is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on merit determined by the marks obtained in the 10+2 examination, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. When did the application process start?
faq.answer: The application process for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 started on 1st January 2026. Candidates can start submitting their applications from this date onwards.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a government job opportunity with the Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi organization, offering contractual positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi. Links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
